style="shape=line;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#000000;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="1" x="590" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="operatorLine" parent="1" style="shape=line;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#000000;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="1" x="940" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actLead" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="10" x="225" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actFollow" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="10" x="585" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actOperator" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="10" x="935" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loopFrame" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;dashed=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=6;" value="loop normal platoon&nbsp;<div>driving</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="125" width="620" x="110" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="altFrame" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;dashed=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=6;" value="alt communication&nbsp;<div>restored /&nbsp;</div><div>communication not&nbsp;</div><div>restored</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="185" width="875" x="110" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="send speed, braking and spacing data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0571" y="15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="205" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="585" y="205" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="status / heartbeat"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0571" y="-15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="585" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="communication timeout detected"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0571" y="15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="325" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="585" y="325" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;" value="Affected follow truck enters safe mode<br>and increases distance" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="210" x="485" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="communication loss warning"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.5286" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="430" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="935" y="430" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="request reconnection"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0571" y="-10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="585" y="490" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="reconnection accepted"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0571" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="530" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="585" y="530" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="resume platoon operation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0571" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="235" y="570" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="585" y="570" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;fontSize=11;" value="if reconnection fails: leave platoon safely"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="595" y="610" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="930" y="610" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
